creator: jdp@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks very much for your patch.  I have committed it with just 
one minor change.  Instead of "#if __FreeBSD__ < 5" I used "#if 
__FreeBSD_version < 500019".  This comes a little bit closer to 
matching the point in time at which the relevant change occurred 
in -current.
